task: Pick up the small block on the left and move it to the right
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A small white cube (block) is on a blue mat. A yellow cube is to the right of the white block. The white block is rigid and small, suitable for grasping. STRATEGY - First, reach and grasp the white block. Then, transport it to the right side of the yellow cube. Finally, place it there. Failure modes include dropping the block during transport or placing it incorrectly. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the white block at its body. Step 2 grasp the white block at its body. Step 3 transport the white block to the right of the yellow cube. Step 4 place the white block on the right side of the yellow cube.
Goal: on(white_block, right_of(yellow_cube)); stable(white_block)
Scene: white_block, yellow_cube, blue_mat
Step 1: reach(white_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the white block
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, white_block, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, white_block) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(white_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the white block
  contact: holding(white_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(white_block)
Step 3: transport(white_block -> right_of(yellow_cube))
  affordance_region: an empty area on the blue mat to the right of the yellow cube
  spatial: above(white_block, right_of(yellow_cube), 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(white_block)
  done_when: above(white_block, right_of(yellow_cube), 0.05)
Step 4: place(white_block -> right_of(yellow_cube))
  affordance_region: an empty area on the blue mat to the right of the yellow cube
  contact: surface_contact(white_block, right_of(yellow_cube)) [completion]; released(white_block) [completion]
  pose: stable(white_block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(white_block, right_of(yellow_cube)) AND released(white_block)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the white block
the body of the white block
an empty area on the blue mat to the right of the yellow cube
an empty area on the blue mat to the right of the yellow cube
